magnesium-bisglycinate.intro: Our bestselling Viridian supplement across Roath and Canton. The bisglycinate form — magnesium bound to glycine — is better absorbed and considerably gentler on the digestive system than the cheaper oxide or sulphate forms you'll find elsewhere.
benefits: Gentler on the stomach than oxide forms
Supports sleep quality and muscle recovery
Contributes to normal nervous system function

high-potency-magnesium-300mg.intro: Viridian's classic high-potency magnesium formula at 300mg elemental magnesium per serving. A reliable, well-absorbed citrate form available in a 30-capsule starter size and a 120-capsule value pack — both stocked across our Cardiff stores.

high-twelve-b-complex.intro: A full-spectrum B complex covering all twelve B vitamins including B12 as methylcobalamin — the active form the body can use directly. One of our most-requested supplements for energy and nervous system support, available in 30 and 90-capsule sizes.

high-five-multivitamin.intro: Viridian's flagship multivitamin and mineral formula, available in three pack sizes to suit both first-timers and long-term users. No artificial fillers, binders or coatings — just active ingredients in well-researched forms.

vitamin-d3.intro: Viridian's vegan D3 range uses cholecalciferol derived from lichen rather than lanolin, making it genuinely suitable for vegans. We stock the 400iu, 1000iu and 2000iu strengths across all three Cardiff stores — the right dose depends on your baseline and how much sun you get.
benefits: Vegan D3 from lichen, not lanolin
Supports immune function and bone health

extra-c.intro: A step up from plain ascorbic acid — this vitamin C formula includes citrus bioflavonoids and rosehip, both of which improve absorption and add antioxidant support. Available in 550mg and 950mg strengths in our Cardiff stores.
benefits: Vitamin C with bioflavonoids and rosehip

synbiotic-daily.intro: A combined probiotic and prebiotic in a single capsule — the prebiotic feeds the live cultures, making it more effective than probiotics taken alone. A solid starting point if you're new to digestive health supplements, and a consistent seller at all three stores.

balanced-zinc-complex.intro: Zinc citrate paired with copper and vitamin B6 — the co-factors needed to keep these minerals in balance. Long-term zinc supplementation on its own can deplete copper, so this formula is a more considered approach.
benefits: Supports immune function and skin health

electrolyte-fix.intro: A liquid electrolyte concentrate with no sugar or artificial additives — popular with runners, cyclists and anyone training in South Wales. Contains magnesium, potassium, sodium and trace minerals. Mix a small amount with water before, during or after exercise.
benefits: Magnesium, potassium, sodium and trace minerals

high-potency-b12.intro: Methylcobalamin B12 at 1000mcg — the active coenzyme form the body uses directly, without the conversion step required by cyanocobalamin. Particularly popular with vegan and vegetarian customers at all three of our Cardiff stores.

balanced-iron-complex.intro: Iron bisglycinate alongside vitamin C, B12 and folic acid — all the co-factors for healthy iron metabolism in one capsule. The bisglycinate form is considerably gentler on the gut than the ferrous sulphate used in many pharmacy iron supplements.
benefits: Includes vitamin C for enhanced absorption
With B12 and folic acid for red blood cells

vitamin-k2.intro: Vitamin K2 as MK-7 derived from natural natto fermentation — the most bioavailable and longest-acting form of K2. Frequently taken alongside vitamin D3 by people focused on bone density or cardiovascular health.
benefits: Supports bone density and calcium metabolism

vitamin-d3-k2.intro: D3 and K2 combined in a single capsule for convenience. D3 increases calcium absorption; K2 directs it to the right places. A popular combination for people who would otherwise be taking two separate capsules.
benefits: D3 and K2 in one daily capsule
Supports bone density and normal calcium use

organic-turmeric.intro: Certified organic turmeric root at 400mg per capsule. One of the most consistent sellers in our herbal range at Roath and Canton. Taken daily by a lot of our regulars for joint comfort and general anti-inflammatory support.

biotin-2500.intro: High-strength biotin at 2500mcg per capsule — well above the levels found in general multivitamins. Commonly taken for hair and nail support, though the evidence is strongest for people with an actual biotin deficiency.
benefits: Supports normal hair growth and condition
Contributes to healthy nails and skin

rainbow-trout-oil.intro: Omega-3 from sustainably farmed Scottish rainbow trout rather than wild-caught small ocean fish. Higher in EPA and DHA than many standard fish oils and with a lower environmental footprint. A more considered choice if sustainability matters to you.
benefits: High EPA and DHA omega-3 content
Cleaner source with lower contaminant risk

ashwagandha-extract.intro: Certified organic ashwagandha root extract — one of the most thoroughly researched adaptogens. Popularity has grown steadily at all our stores as more people look for evidence-backed options for stress and energy support.
benefits: Supports the body's response to stress

l-lysine.intro: An essential amino acid the body cannot make itself. Most commonly taken at our stores for cold sore prevention and management, and also used for collagen support. Available in a 30-capsule and 90-capsule size.
benefits: Essential amino acid — must come from diet

high-potency-nac.intro: N-Acetyl Cysteine at 600mg per capsule — a precursor to glutathione, the body's primary antioxidant. Growing in popularity at our stores as its benefits for liver support, respiratory health and recovery become more widely understood.

organic-milk-thistle.intro: Certified organic milk thistle seed at 400mg per capsule. A traditional European herb for liver support — commonly taken alongside medications, after periods of overindulgence, or as part of a general detox programme. Available in 30 and 90-cap sizes.
